name: Honey Cake
description: Ten thin layers with a burnt honey cream — caramelized at the edges, soft in the middle.

name: Basque Cheesecake
description: Intentionally scorched, impossibly creamy — no water bath, no apology.

name: Ao Shiso Chiffon
description: A barely-there herbal note in a cloud-light chiffon. Subtler than you expect.

name: Strawberry Chiffon
description: Fresh strawberry folded into airy chiffon — peak season only, no extracts.

name: Black Sesame Chiffon
description: Ground black sesame gives the crumb a slate-grey tint and a roasted depth.

name: Shokupan
description: Pillowy milk bread with a pull-apart top. Best eaten the day it's made.

name: Yuzu Cream Roll
description: A sponge roll with yuzu-scented cream — clean citrus, not candy.

name: Hōjicha Basque
description: All the burnished character of hōjicha in a barely-set basque — warm, bitter-edged, good.
